_comment: Gold answers. synthetic_yard.pdf is generated & provable now (see ci_tests.py _gen_synthetic_yard) and also carries manhole_count 26 for the MARKED-path Circle-annot counter (robust_takeoff.count_manholes_marked), matching marker_count. The Winvic entries are REAL known quantities from the costing sheet, now activated against the real PDFs in drawings/winvic/. Keys are paths relative to the repo root. drawings/_int_d77.pdf is the colour-coded UNMARKED path with gold from Smita's Bluebeam measurement. drawings/_int_d77_borders.pdf proves the border/legend exclusion fix (segment_hatch exclude_border=True).

drawings/winvic/Area_Office_Floors_GA.pd.note: whole marked sheet (README 'Office 3,479 exact'); 520 m2 is only the GF-ancillary sub-zone (column_count 22)

drawings/_int_d77.pdf.note: Smita's Bluebeam measurement; current pipeline gives ~3159 (~0.1%)

drawings/_int_d77_borders.pdf.note: Same yard as _int_d77 plus a grey sheet-frame border strip + legend swatch (Aryan field report: real SGP sheets over-measure by border/legend grey). With border/legend exclusion (segment_hatch exclude_border=True) this must match _int_d77's 3,159 m², not over-count.

drawings/_int_d77_footpath.pdf.note: Same yard as _int_d77 plus a darker, adjacent 'Footpaths (ancillary): Concrete' legend-grey strip bridged into the yard by binary_closing (Aryan's real SGP sheet: 3,172 vs Smita's Bluebeam gold 3,156 — root cause of the +16 m2 was the generic 214+-14 band admitting the darker ancillary-concrete grey). Proves the swatch-locked band fix (takeoff_unmarked.py: rgb locked to the legend-confirmed swatch colour instead of the generic band) excludes the footpath strip and returns to gold; see ci_tests.py 'D77 swatch-locked grey band' block for the before/after repro (before-fix generic band = 3,177 m2).

drawings/real_sgp/D77_Hard_Landscaping.p.note: THE REAL SGP sheet (105301-SGP-01-ZZ-DR-A-131002-P03, posted by Aryan in #fortel 4 Jul). Smita's Bluebeam gold 3,156. Swatch-locked band measures 3,164 (+0.25%); Aryan's pre-fix run read 3,172. Gitignored client drawing — harness includes it only where the file exists.

Upper floors (multi-zone).note: plant deck logged 1120 but ~149 — engine must flag the outlier; no matching real PDF downloaded yet

Yard manhole_count.note: Winvic costing sheet 'E/O for MH details, 26 Nr, £75.00, £1,950.00' — the real Yard_Area_Proposed_Site_Plan.pdf in drawings/winvic/ as shipped in this repo carries NO Circle annots (confirmed by direct inspection; its 18 Square annots are AutoCAD SHX Text boxes for street names/numbers, not manhole markers), so count_manholes_marked() honestly returns 0 on it today. The mechanism is proven against drawings/synthetic_yard.pdf (manhole_count 26) instead; move this into the active gold block once Fortel places real Circle manhole markers on the Winvic PDF.
